Sector 10 Gurgaon is located in one of the prime locations in Gurgaon, Haryana. Sector 10 is growing densely owing to its commercial, educational, and residential popularity in recent times. Noted neighboring locations are Basai Village, Garauli, Kalan, Civil Lines, Dhankot, etc. Popular residential projects set up in the locality are Sapna Floors 1, 3D ventures, Aadhar R K Homes 1, and many more. The nearest railway station to Sector 10 Gurgaon is the Basai Dhankot Railway Station, which is just 4 km away and can be reached via Basai Road, and the main station Gurgaon Railway Station is located 6 km away from Sector 10 Gurgaon. Yellow line Gurgaon metro runs through Sector 10, and many metro stations are within the proximal distance. Indira Gandhi International Airport is 22 km away from the locality. Top healthcare facilities like the Sethi Hospital, Vedic Hospital, Lotus Hospital, etc. Educational establishments are Blue Bells Public School, Alpine Convent School, Saint John’s Convent School, Euro International School, etc. Many employment hubs like DLF Cyber City are 17 km and can be accessed via NH 48, Nokia Solutions and Network, Kamdhenu Ltd, BMW India Pvt Ltd, Akzo Nobel India Ltd, American Express Banking Corporation, etc.

Sector-105 is situated in the prime location of Gurgaon surrounded by all the residential facilities. Based on the banks of the River Sahibi, the region is close to the Jainpur forest and Sulatanpur bird sanctuary. It is well connected to the other NCR by the Dwarka Express Highway and the Delhi Jaipur Highway. The National Highway 8 or NH8 is just a few minutes‚ drive from the region. It has both domestic and international airports close to it and is very close to the capital of India, Delhi. Sector-105 offers excellent educational facilities as it has some of the top educational institutes such as the Scottish High International School, G.A.V. Academy, Sharda International School, ITM University, AIMS, SGT Institute of Technology and Fairfield Institute of management and Technology among others. The Columbia Asia Hospital which is at a short driving distance and offers excellent medical service throughout the day and has an expert medical team to serve the patients with utmost care. AIIMS and the ESIC Model Hospital are also close to the location. Sector-105 of Gurgaon also has many recreational centers and malls like the Palam Vihar Park, Fountain Park, Ambience Mall, MGF Mall and the Gold Souk Mall.

Sector-105 is situated in the prime location of Gurgaon surrounded by all the residential facilities. Based on the banks of the River Sahibi, the region is close to the Jainpur forest and Sulatanpur bird sanctuary. It is well connected to the other NCR by the Dwarka Express Highway and the Delhi Jaipur Highway. The National Highway 8 or NH8 is just a few minutes‚ drive from the region. It has both domestic and international airports close to it and is very close to the capital of India, Delhi. Sector-105 offers excellent educational facilities as it has some of the top educational institutes such as the Scottish High International School, G.A.V. Academy, Sharda International School, ITM University, AIMS, SGT Institute of Technology and Fairfield Institute of management and Technology among others. The Columbia Asia Hospital which is at a short driving distance and offers excellent medical service throughout the day and has an expert medical team to serve the patients with utmost care. AIIMS and the ESIC Model Hospital are also close to the location. Sector-105 of Gurgaon also has many recreational centers and malls like the Palam Vihar Park, Fountain Park, Ambience Mall, MGF Mall and the Gold Souk Mall.

Sector 33 is one of the most rapidly developing areas in Gurgaon. It is well connected to NH-8(Delhi-Mumbai) via Rajaji Chowk & NH-2(Delhi-Kolkata) via Palwal-Sohna Road on State Highway 13. It's easy connectivity to IMT Sohna that houses prominent companies has resulted in creating a number of job opportunities for people in and around this place. The area has great connectivity to Golf Course Extension Road, KMP Expressway, ILD Trade Center and Medcity via roadways. Huda City Metro Station is also located in its proximity. Traveling to Indira Gandhi International Airport is easier due to the presence of well-planned roads. Educational institutes such as GD Goenka World School, Ryan International, KR Mangalam University, DPS & Pathways Group of Institution are located within the radius of this area. Sector 33 predicts to be the fastest stretches in terms of commercial and Real Estate developments in the next new years as some of the reputed Real Estate conglomerates are planning their projects in this part of the millennium city. This has attracted many working professionals and property investors to settle in and around this locale.

Sector 57 is a developing locality situated in Gurgaon, Haryana. The pin code of Sector 57 is 122003 and postal head office is Gurgaon Sector 45. Sector 51, Sector 52, Wazirabad, Samaspur, Sector 50 are the nearby localities to Sector 57. 3 BHK and 2 BHK are the most common room configuration in this region. Punjabi is the native language in this region, people also speak and understand Hindi and English as well. Gurgaon railway station is at close proximity to the locality. There are many new commercial businesses that have been expanded to this region due to good road connectivity. Sector 57 has good cellular connectivity which is need of the hour as many people are working from home and many students are attending their online lectures. Schools and Colleges are at close proximity from this locality. There are no load sheading issues in Sector 57. The locality has good green cover as trees are being planted on either side of the roads making the drive much enjoyable. There are no water scarcity issues in Sector 57 even in summer season.

Sector 10A is a residential locality in Gurgaon, Haryana. The pin code of Sector 10A is 122001. Kadipur, Naharpur Roopa, Shahpur-jat, Sector 37 are the nearby localities to Sector 10A. Punjabi is the local language in this region. There are many independent row houses and residential buildings in this area. 2 BHK and 3 BHK are the most common room design in this locality. Delhi Jaipur highway passes through this locality. Hospitals and clinics are at close proximity and many of them are open 24 hours a day which makes it easy for patient admission. Day to day essentials can be easily obtained from the local departmental stores and one need not travel long distance for the same. Basai Dhankot railway station is at a distance of 5 km from the locality. There is no water scarcity in the region as there are over head water tanks present. Sector 10A has good cellular connectivity which is of prime importance as many people are working from home and many of the students are attending their online lectures during the pandemic now.

Sector 4 is a residential area in Old Gurgaon, located along the Old Railway Road, Rezang La Marg and Dhanwapur Road. Comprising majorly of independent houses and builder floors, the sector also houses a few low-rise buildings. Sector 4 is one of the earliest residential Pockets of Gurgaon surrounded by lush greenery markets. The sector has close proximity to key employment hubs, including Unitech Infospace Complex, Cyber City and Udyog Vihar, Mgf Metropolitan Mall. Easily accessible railway and bus stations for movement of goods and people. The region is far away from the new Gurgaon area. Krishna Colony, Gurgaon; Dayanand Colony, Gurgaon are a few nearest localities. Sector 4 Gurgaon is an affordable housing hub offering ample residential floors and villas by homegrown builders. Orchid Business Park (9 km), Emaar Business Park (10 km) and Global Business Park (12 km) are close to the sector. Gurgaon Railway Station, operating on the Delhi-Jaipur line, is only 2 km from the sector via Old Railway Road. MG Road Station on the Yellow Line is about 9 km from the sector and connects to Rajiv Chowk and Kashmere Gate. Indira Gandhi International Airport is about 20 km from the sector via NH-48

Apartments in Sector 50 range from 1BHK to 8BHK which are well furnished with latest designs and amenities. Developer Profile
Unitech Limited is considered amongst the leading companies regarded for its diversified experience in the Indian realty industry. Founded in 1972, the developer has led a plethora of projects encompassing world-class commercial complexes, IT/ITes parks, SEZs, integrated residential developments, schools, hotels, malls, golf courses and amusement parks. An ISO 9001:2000 company, the builder has won various awards in the sphere of Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiatives and for the amazing projects in the infrastructure, residential and commercial domain.
Unitech Limited has its presence across prominent Indian cities such as Bhopal, Mumbai, Amritsar, Kolkata, Dehradun, Bengaluru, Trivandrum, Hyderabad, Kochi, Mangalore, Chandigarh, Siliguri, Mysore and Lucknow. It won the CW Architect and Builders Award, 2008 for being one of India's top 10 builders; ISCF (Indian Shopping Center Forum) Award for the best design in 2008 and Cityscape Awards in 2009 for Deal of distinction.
Experience and strengths
With the objective of Pan-India Footprint, Unitech Limited has successfully collaborated with internationally acclaimed architects as well as leading global organisations such as Som, Callison and HOK. Companies like Fidelity, HSBC, Sun Life, Marriott, Reebok, IBM, RBS, Ernst & Young, Bank of America and LG are listed among its blue-chip customer portfolio.
The builder has launched several integrated townships comprising of luxurious villas, apartments, offices, retail spaces, schools and clubs; as well as plotted developments. It is also known for designing Grade 'A' complexes in NCR town of Gurgaon namely the Cyber Park, the Signature Towers, the Global Business Parks, the Unitech Business Park, the Unitech Trade Centre, the Millenium Plaza and the Unitech Corporate Park. Aimed at constructing energy efficient buildings, the builder has registered all our commercial developments in NCR in LEED Core and Shell rating LEED (Leadership in Energy and Environment Design).
Unitech Limited aims to reach the pinnacle when it comes to providing the customers with a better lifestyle experience through quality construction, customer-oriented approach, environment-friendly amenities as well as aesthetically and efficiently designed housing spaces. The group is headed by its Executive Chairman, Ramesh Chandra, and Managing Director, Ajay Chandra. Led by a well-managed architectural and engineering team, Unitech Limited has embarked on a mission to become the first choice amongst its customers.
Projects
In a span of 47 years, Unitech Limited has grown rapidly with the development of over 100 projects to its credit. Out of 95 residential projects, 34 projects are ongoing and include 1BHK and 2BHK apartments and luxurious 3, 4 and 5BHK villas. The developer has built world-class malls and owns 4.5 million sqft of under-construction retail space.

Sector 48 is one of the most preferred residential destinations in Gurgaon. Located in the buzzing South of Gurugram, this area offers easy access to IT hubs, malls, retail destinations, and entertainment centers. Established educational institutions and hospitals are in the vicinity. All these features make Sector 48 an ideal location for residential living. Real estate options in Sector 48 Gurgaon include options such as affordable 2 and 3BHK apartments, 4 and 5BHK villas, plots, and high-end luxury homes. There are a variety of options for both budget-conscious and luxury property seekers. Many well-known developers have their projects in this area, making it a great option for real estate investment. The average price of a property in Sector 48 Gurgaon is around Rs. 8,000- 12,000 per sq. ft. The rates remain around the same after considering the locality and the project. The area continues to attract several home buyers and investors, mainly due to its excellent connectivity with nearby cities, the presence of well-developed infrastructural facilities, and affordable property rates.

Locality Guide
for Sector 105, Gurgaon

Sector-105 is situated in the prime location of Gurgaon surrounded by all the residential facilities. Based on the banks of the River Sahibi, the region is close to the Jainpur forest and Sulatanpur bird sanctuary. It is well connected to the other NCR by the Dwarka Express Highway and the Delhi Jaipur Highway. The National Highway 8 or NH8 is just a few minutes‚ drive from the region. It has both domestic and international airports close to it and is very close to the capital of India, Delhi. Sector-105 offers excellent educational facilities as it has some of the top educational institutes such as the Scottish High International School, G.A.V. Academy, Sharda International School, ITM University, AIMS, SGT Institute of Technology and Fairfield Institute of management and Technology among others. The Columbia Asia Hospital which is at a short driving distance and offers excellent medical service throughout the day and has an expert medical team to serve the patients with utmost care. AIIMS and the ESIC Model Hospital are also close to the location. Sector-105 of Gurgaon also has many recreational centers and malls like the Palam Vihar Park, Fountain Park, Ambience Mall, MGF Mall and the Gold Souk Mall.

Sector-105 is situated in the prime location of Gurgaon surrounded by all the residential facilities. Based on the banks of the River Sahibi, the region is close to the Jainpur forest and Sulatanpur bird sanctuary. It is well connected to the other NCR by the Dwarka Express Highway and the Delhi Jaipur Highway. The National Highway 8 or NH8 is just a few minutes‚ drive from the region. It has both domestic and international airports close to it and is very close to the capital of India, Delhi. Sector-105 offers excellent educational facilities as it has some of the top educational institutes such as the Scottish High International School, G.A.V. Academy, Sharda International School, ITM University, AIMS, SGT Institute of Technology and Fairfield Institute of management and Technology among others. The Columbia Asia Hospital which is at a short driving distance and offers excellent medical service throughout the day and has an expert medical team to serve the patients with utmost care. AIIMS and the ESIC Model Hospital are also close to the location. Sector-105 of Gurgaon also has many recreational centers and malls like the Palam Vihar Park, Fountain Park, Ambience Mall, MGF Mall and the Gold Souk Mall.

Sector 10A is a residential locality in Gurgaon, Haryana. The pin code of Sector 10A is 122001. Kadipur, Naharpur Roopa, Shahpur-jat, Sector 37 are the nearby localities to Sector 10A. Punjabi is the local language in this region. There are many independent row houses and residential buildings in this area. 2 BHK and 3 BHK are the most common room design in this locality. Delhi Jaipur highway passes through this locality. Hospitals and clinics are at close proximity and many of them are open 24 hours a day which makes it easy for patient admission. Day to day essentials can be easily obtained from the local departmental stores and one need not travel long distance for the same. Basai Dhankot railway station is at a distance of 5 km from the locality. There is no water scarcity in the region as there are over head water tanks present. Sector 10A has good cellular connectivity which is of prime importance as many people are working from home and many of the students are attending their online lectures during the pandemic now.

Locality Guide
for Sector 9, Gurgaon
Share

Sector 9 A is one of the most rapidly developing areas in Gurgaon. It is well-connected to NH- 8 (Delhi-Mumbai) via Rajiv Chowk and NH-2 (Delhi-Kolkata) via Palwal-Sohna Road on State Highway 13. Its easy connectivity to IMT Sohna that houses prominent companies has resulted in creating a number of job opportunities for people residing in and around this place. The area has great connectivity to Golf Course Extension Road, KMP Expressway, ILD Trade Centre and Medcity via roadways. The place is well connected to other parts of Gurgaon through arterial roads, Pataudi Road and Basai Road. Huda City Metro Station is also located in its proximity. Traveling to Indira Gandhi International Airport is easier due to the presence of well-planned roads. Educational institutes such as GD Goenka World School, Ryan International, KR Mangalam University, DPS and Pathways Group of Institution are located within the radius of this area. Sector 9A houses Kadipur Pond and HUDA Park that gives the locality its pristine nature where people can relax and spend time with their loved ones. The area has its share of retail outlets and markets that gives a cosmopolitan feel.

Gurgaon Sector 49 is a beautiful & lavish part of Gurugram district, Haryana state, and has citizens of 25500 people. There are 13789 males and 11711 females in the population. The area is approximately 3.12 square kilometers in size. Gurgaon Sector 49 is a fast-growing industrial town that is part of the Delhi National Capital Region (NCR). Gurgaon Sector 49 is an established locality placed near Badshahpur crossing at the intersection of Sohna road & Golf course extension road. It is a newly constructed area. Gurgaon Sector 49 is a pleasant and relaxing residential neighborhood in which to live. This area has landscaped grounds as well as excellent transportation. Gurgaon Sector 49 is well integrated into all of Gurgaon's happening places. It is a safe neighborhood that is close to colleges and universities, health facilities, a nice garden, and corporate entities on NH-8. Gurgaon Sector 49 is close to the metro station Huda City Center which is on the yellow line. The area is close to prominent educational institutions and hospitals that offer the world-class facility. The area is well-connected to Delhi NCR via excellent road connectivity.

Sector-105 is situated in the prime location of Gurgaon surrounded by all the residential facilities. Based on the banks of the River Sahibi, the region is close to the Jainpur forest and Sulatanpur bird sanctuary. It is well connected to the other NCR by the Dwarka Express Highway and the Delhi Jaipur Highway. The National Highway 8 or NH8 is just a few minutes‚ drive from the region. It has both domestic and international airports close to it and is very close to the capital of India, Delhi. Sector-105 offers excellent educational facilities as it has some of the top educational institutes such as the Scottish High International School, G.A.V. Academy, Sharda International School, ITM University, AIMS, SGT Institute of Technology and Fairfield Institute of management and Technology among others. The Columbia Asia Hospital which is at a short driving distance and offers excellent medical service throughout the day and has an expert medical team to serve the patients with utmost care. AIIMS and the ESIC Model Hospital are also close to the location. Sector-105 of Gurgaon also has many recreational centers and malls like the Palam Vihar Park, Fountain Park, Ambience Mall, MGF Mall and the Gold Souk Mall.

Sector-105 is situated in the prime location of Gurgaon surrounded by all the residential facilities. Based on the banks of the River Sahibi, the region is close to the Jainpur forest and Sulatanpur bird sanctuary. It is well connected to the other NCR by the Dwarka Express Highway and the Delhi Jaipur Highway. The National Highway 8 or NH8 is just a few minutes‚ drive from the region. It has both domestic and international airports close to it and is very close to the capital of India, Delhi. Sector-105 offers excellent educational facilities as it has some of the top educational institutes such as the Scottish High International School, G.A.V. Academy, Sharda International School, ITM University, AIMS, SGT Institute of Technology and Fairfield Institute of management and Technology among others. The Columbia Asia Hospital which is at a short driving distance and offers excellent medical service throughout the day and has an expert medical team to serve the patients with utmost care. AIIMS and the ESIC Model Hospital are also close to the location. Sector-105 of Gurgaon also has many recreational centers and malls like the Palam Vihar Park, Fountain Park, Ambience Mall, MGF Mall and the Gold Souk Mall.

Sector-105 is situated in the prime location of Gurgaon surrounded by all the residential facilities. Based on the banks of the River Sahibi, the region is close to the Jainpur forest and Sulatanpur bird sanctuary. It is well connected to the other NCR by the Dwarka Express Highway and the Delhi Jaipur Highway. The National Highway 8 or NH8 is just a few minutes‚ drive from the region. It has both domestic and international airports close to it and is very close to the capital of India, Delhi. Sector-105 offers excellent educational facilities as it has some of the top educational institutes such as the Scottish High International School, G.A.V. Academy, Sharda International School, ITM University, AIMS, SGT Institute of Technology and Fairfield Institute of management and Technology among others. The Columbia Asia Hospital which is at a short driving distance and offers excellent medical service throughout the day and has an expert medical team to serve the patients with utmost care. AIIMS and the ESIC Model Hospital are also close to the location. Sector-105 of Gurgaon also has many recreational centers and malls like the Palam Vihar Park, Fountain Park, Ambience Mall, MGF Mall and the Gold Souk Mall.

Sector 41, Gurgaon is quickly becoming one of the posh localities in Delhi NCR. It at a stone‚ s throw distance from the Dwarka Expressway which the widest expressway of the country. It is also adjacent to the proposed Interstate Bus Terminal and Metro hub thus making commuting easy for its residents. Indira Gandhi International Airport is at brief driving distance via the new Dwarka Expressway. Gurgaon Railway Station is also round the corner and proximity to the current metro station of Huda City Centre makes the site a good investment. The presence of Special Economic Zone and the New Gurgaon Commercial Belt has attracted many working professionals to settle in and around this locale. Sector 41 is developing faster and more desirable as small to large sized corporates are planning to set up operations in and around this belt. The locale is in close proximity to many other amenities such as malls, schools, hospitals and the other entertainment avenues. The presence of basic establishments has transformed Sector 41 as one of the most preferred residential areas of Gurgaon.

DLF Phase 3 is the first locality, as we enter Gurgaon from Delhi via both NH 8 and Mehrauli Gurgaon (MG) Road. DLF sectors are located at the boundary of Delhi and Haryana. The locality is spread over Sector 23 and Sector 24 of Gurgaon. DLF Phase 3 is one of the poshest localities in the city due to its prime location and great social infrastructure. Surrounded by NH 8 and MG Road on both sides, the locality also has access to two metro lines. The locality benefits from the presence of Ambience mall, Cyber hub, and Aravali Biodiversity Park. DLF and Ambience are the major developers in the locality. Ambience Lagoon, Ambience Caitriona, and Garden Estate are some of the prominent projects within DLF Phase 3. DLF Phase 3 is one of the best-connected localities of Gurgaon. The locality is just 13 km (25 mins) away from the Indira Gandhi International Airport. DLF Phase 3 has some of the most prominent schools, health care centres, and shopping centers. The area is adjacent to employment hubs. The area has high ratings on safety and livability parameters. Is DLF Phase 3 a posh area? Yes, DLF Phase 3 is considered a posh area in Gurgaon. It boasts some of the sought-after residential properties in the city and is home to luxury malls, exclusive restaurants, and modern cinemas.
